creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tod McQuillin from comment #28)
> (In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #9)
> 
> Hi Niclas,
> 
> I'm pretty sure there is no kernel driver for the mga, and pretty sure
> there's no way i'm using it if it does exist.
> 
> I'm not 100% sure how to know for certain but here's my dmesg if that helps:
> 


This turned out to be a false lead of sorts.  On FreeBSD, vgapci attaches to all graphics drivers, which sometimes causes confusion.  Can you try the attached patch and see if it resolves the issues you're seeing?
Thanks!
